zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan於1402年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾格拉斯波利時，她的父親Davydd ap Cadwgan17歲，母親Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd17歲。她和Sir Thomas Vaughan至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1482年2月10日在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan于1402年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾格拉斯波利时，她的父亲Davydd ap Cadwgan17岁，母亲Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd17岁。她和Sir Thomas Vaughan至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1482年2月10日在英国達勒姆拉比 卡素享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Vaughan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

variants.name: Von
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Veon
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Welsh   Vaughan  .

variants.name: Vaughns
meanings: Welsh: variant of Vaughan , with English patronymic -s.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Gethin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from a lenited adjectival form of the byname Cethin ‘dusky, swarthy’.

variants.name: Gethen
meanings: Traditional: from a lenited adjectival form of the byname Cethin ‘dusky, swarthy’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan was born in 1402, in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales, her father, Davydd ap Cadwgan, was 17 and her mother, Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd, was 17. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Thomas Vaughan. She died on 10 February 1482, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan est née en 1402, à Glasbury, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Davydd ap Cadwgan, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Thomas Vaughan. Elle est décédée le 10 février 1482, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan 1402 in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Davydd ap Cadwgan 17 und ihre Mutter Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd 17. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Vaughan mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Februar 1482 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Raby Castle, Durham, England und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan è nata il nel 1402 nel Glasbury, Breconshire, Galles, sua padre, Davydd ap Cadwgan, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Thomas Vaughan. Morì il 10 febbraio 1482, nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughanが1402年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアグラスブリーで生まれた時，父Davydd ap Cadwganは17歳，母Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffuddは17歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas Vaughanとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1482年2月10日にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan(이)가 1402년 웨일스 브레콘실르 글라스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Davydd ap Cadwgan(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Vaughan(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 2월 10일 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Kington, Herefordshire Unitary Authority: Kington, Herefordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan nasceu em 1402, em Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Davydd ap Cadwgan, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Thomas Vaughan. Ela faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1482, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan родилась в 1402 г. в местности гласбури, брекуншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Davydd ap Cadwgan было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Sir Thomas Vaughan. Она умерла 10 февраля 1482 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Ellen Gethin Vaughan nació en 1402, en Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Davydd ap Cadwgan, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Tangwystl Llwyd verch Gruffudd, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Thomas Vaughan. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1482, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
